about.title: About me
about.lead: A Software Engineer with 13+ years in IT. I take a product through its whole lifecycle — from architecture design to production delivery. My strong suit is frontend (React, Next.js, TypeScript); I'm confident with backend (Node.js, PostgreSQL) and infrastructure (Docker, CI/CD).

hero.title: Language model comparison matrix
hero.subtitle: Pricing, context and key benchmarks for current LLMs — by the numbers, not by promises. Sort by any column, filter, and pin up to three models for a head-to-head comparison.
hero.provenance: pricing (standard tier, $/1M tokens) and benchmarks per vendor data, verified {pricingAsOf}. Unknown values are shown as a dash, not invented. Benchmarks: MMLU, GPQA Diamond, SWE-bench Verified, AIME; conditions vary by vendor.

empty.title: No model matches
empty.description: The filters are too narrow — try removing some conditions to see models again.

mmlu.hint: MMLU — general knowledge across 57 subjects, % correct answers.

sweBench.hint: SWE-bench Verified — solving real GitHub issues (agentic code), %.

aime.hint: AIME — olympiad math, % of problems solved.

meta.title: Compare LLMs: pricing, context and language-model benchmarks
meta.description: A comparison matrix of current LLMs: price per 1M tokens (input/output), context window and key benchmarks (MMLU, GPQA, SWE-bench, AIME). Sort, filter and compare up to three models.
meta.ogDescription: Pricing, context and benchmarks of current language models in one comparison table.

hero.title: The history of large language models
hero.subtitle: A timeline of key LLMs — from the first transformers to reasoning models and agents. Click a model to see details, facts and sources.
